Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants that include a complete reviewer assignment cycle
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Checklist Completed, as a prerequisite step influencing the timing of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation until the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time elapsed between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that result in SW-EIC Accept versus those that lead to SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment, which precedes the initiation of reviewer selection and ultimately affects when SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Manuscript Export Succeeded, as an early system step that must complete before plagiarism checks and checklist completion can enable reviewer assignment
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2), compared to variants without reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to the final occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in multi-round revision cases (e.g., involving RW-Initial Reviewer Selection), highlighting end-to-end duration across submission cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
